source: SVGlide local seed registry for create-svg authoring
notes: This registry localizes Open Design's seed-first workflow for SVGlide.
Seeds are machine-readable generation controls, not HTML/CSS runtime templates.
SVGlide output remains 960x540 protocol SVG that the Slides service snapshots into a slide.

agenda_numbered_path.page_use: agenda, contents, meeting path, deck map

capability_icon_map.page_use: capability map, product modules, team roles

kpi_big_number.page_use: single KPI, annual result, growth target
quality_rules: chart is real SVG geometry or approved chart marker

single_chart_takeaway.page_use: trend insight, category comparison, data evidence
quality_rules: chart is not a decorative bar strip

dashboard_kpi_grid.page_use: operating dashboard, project status, KPI grid

quality_rules: note strip is not a paragraph

architecture_layered_system.page_use: system architecture, service map, module dependency

image_story_showcase.page_use: case study, screenshot story, product proof
quality_rules: callouts do not obscure inspection-critical content
